response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development across multiple domains, including embedded systems (DLang, C/C++), networking, and security-related projects. However, his resume lacks direct experience with Linux kernel modifications, MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, or embedded networking products. His strongest skills are in JavaScript/TypeScript and web development, which do not align closely with the embedded networking security focus required for this role. Native-level Japanese proficiency and explicit Linux kernel experience are not mentioned.
strengths: Strong C/C++ and embedded systems experience (e.g., National Instruments, robotics arms)
Demonstrated ability to learn and apply new technologies quickly (e.g., DLang, AI-agent infrastructure)
Proven track record in open-source contributions and complex system development
concerns: No direct experience with Linux kernel modifications or security technologies like MACsec or IEEE 802.1X
Lacks native-level Japanese proficiency (only basic German and fluent English listed)
Minimal exposure to networking switch operations, REST API, NETCONF, or SNMP for embedded products

key_factors.factor: Experience with Linux kernel and security technologies
